description: Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty (RFE/RL) is a US-funded international broadcaster headquartered in Prague, Czech Republic. Established during the Cold War to provide free press to countries behind the Iron Curtain, RFE/RL today broadcasts in 27 languages across Central Asia, Eastern Europe, the Caucasus, and the Middle East. It is funded by the [US Agency for Global Media](/orgs/us-agency-for-global-media) and operates as a private non-profit. RFE/RL's Persian-language service, [Radio Farda](/orgs/radio-farda), is one of the most prominent diaspora media outlets targeting audiences inside Iran.
editorial_notes: Parent org of Radio Farda. Headquartered in Prague. Funded by USAGM.
